election.name: June 2, 2026 San Francisco Consolidated Statewide Direct Primary Election
election.notes: Machine-readable tracked contest universe for M002/S01. It replaces the former public Mayor fixture with real 2026 contests and documents official-data gaps instead of inventing candidates, options, endorsements, or URLs.

provenance.notes: California statewide, congressional, BOE, and Assembly candidate entities are sourced from the California Secretary of State certified candidate list. San Francisco-only contests and measures are tracked but hidden until durable official local records are imported.

trackedRaces.title: California Governor
trackedRaces.officialDataNotes: Candidate list imported from California Secretary of State certified candidate list dated 2026-03-26. Public informational records cite the official listing only and are not endorsements or recommendations.

sourceRegistry.notes: MD-listed source records are represented as source registry entries with pending/manual notes when 2026 guide URLs are not yet confirmed. They are not used as public recommendation evidence until guide artifacts are reviewed.

sampleRemoval.notes: No public launch collection references the former Mayor fixture; tests scan canonical public data for legacy candidate names, fixture flags, and guide URLs.
